test_command: node --check workflows/ticketmill.js && node scripts/lint-engine.js && bash -n scripts/setup-worktree.sh && node -e "['.claude-plugin/plugin.json','.claude-plugin/marketplace.json'].forEach(f=>JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8')))" && node --test && bash tests/setup-worktree.test.sh
verify_notes: This repo IS the ticketmill plugin: the engine (workflows/ticketmill.js), skills (skills/*/SKILL.md), and setup script are the product. There is no runtime app to boot.

The engine cannot be imported by Node — it uses Workflow-tool globals (agent, parallel, pipeline, phase, log, args, budget) and top-level await. Test logic via extracted pure helpers or a harness that stubs those globals.

Engine sandbox rules: no Date.now(), Math.random(), or argless new Date(); no fs/Node APIs; plain JS only. node --check does NOT catch these — scripts/lint-engine.js does, wired into test_command right after node --check. It skips pure-comment lines and any line with the literal `// sandbox-ok` marker; use that marker (not a weaker exception) for a genuine false positive.

LOCKSTEP-EDIT RULE: workflows/ticketmill.js and .claude/workflows/ticketmill.js are the SAME engine and must stay byte-identical — scripts/lint-engine.js enforces this with a byte-compare and fails the whole test_command if they drift. Whenever you edit workflows/ticketmill.js, immediately `cp workflows/ticketmill.js .claude/workflows/ticketmill.js` in the same commit. Never edit only one copy.
Release discipline: every change updates CHANGELOG.md and bumps .claude-plugin/plugin.json version (conventional commits). marketplace.json has no version field — never add one.

test_command runs syntax/manifest smoke checks then `node --test`, which auto-discovers tests/*.test.js (bare `node --test`, not `node --test tests/` — the directory-arg form throws MODULE_NOT_FOUND on Node 22.22.0).
